pam.note: ~7-fold expansion in targetable sequence space vs WT. S542R is the key PAM-expansion mutation. GUIDE-seq confirms more off-targets than WT at TTTV PAMs.

seed.note: Seed architecture preserved but overall mismatch tolerance increased vs WT. enAsCas12a-HF1 (+ N282A) restores single-mismatch intolerance.

kinetics.note: No published trans-cleavage kinetic constants. On-target editing ~2× WT at TTTV PAMs.

temperature.low_temp_performance: E174R improves performance at lower temperatures vs WT AsCas12a, but still underperforms LbCas12a at ≤32°C

references.data: Mutations, expanded PAM set, HT-PAMDA profiling, GUIDE-seq off-targets
